emails.subject: Re: itinerary for mark guzman 25mar travel
emails.body: Re: itinerary for mark guzman 25mar travel Bill, FYI. You have both David Porter and me working on that day shift. Either we need to let the night shift know that they need to come in an hour and a half early, put someone else on that day shift, or change the itenerary. Let me know when you have this resolved. Thank you for your attention to this matter.
